name: Sabro Sabnock

name: Tokage Souryo
description: A lizardman adventurer who forms a party with High Elf Archer and Dwarf Shaman. They later team up with Goblin Slayer and Priestess. His rank is silver, the third highest rank. Calm and composed, he speaks to people politely and adresses them in a respectful manner. He seems to be the most soft-spoken, even-tempered, and sociable member of the party. name: Tsukuyo Inaba
description: Tsukuyo is a child prodigy that skipped several grades, making her the youngest member of the Tenka Goken. Despite being so young, however, she is unquestionably the strongest member. While blind, she has excellent hearing, to the point that she is capable of hearing most things going on in the academy. Even though she carries a calm and collected demeanor, she can still act childishly, much like the many instances where she likes to show off her knowledge resulting in long rambles. Tsukuyo is a

name: Tsunagu Hakamada
description: __Height:__ 190cm (6'3") __Quirk:__ Fiber Master Pro Hero, ranked in the top 4. He is the recipient of the "Best Jeanist" award for eight consecutive years. Tsunagu is an elegant man with flamboyant tendencies. He believes very strongly that people with influence must maintain a positive appearance both physically and socially. name: Alisa Haiba
description: __Height:__ 178 cm __Nationality:__ Half-Russian; Half-Japanese __Likes:__ Sushi Alisa is an older sister of first year Nekoma Team player: [Lev Haiba](https://anilist.co/character/89517/Lev-Haiba). From the moment of her debut, Alisa has acted as lively and bubbly, but also as innocent as her brother is. She is very supportive of Lev, affectionately referring to him as "Lyovochka" and cheering him on during his match. It's also been implied that she's a bit of an imaginative romantic, which was

name: Changge Gu
description: Gu Changge is the main character of the I Am The Fated Villain series.

name: Echizen
description: [Ohta](https://anilist.co/character/89788/Ohta)'s childhood friend. She loves [Miyano](https://anilist.co/character/89789/Miyano) as a friend and affectionately calls her Myaano. Echizen is quite aggressive toward anyone, excluding Miyano. She gets upset or angry about small things; one example is whenever Ohta calls her 'Ecchan'. She also lacks the ability to eat sweets if they are "cute". She easily jumps to conclusions but is very dedicated to helping in what she believes in.

description: She is solemn high school girl in Class 2-F at first glance, she is the survival specialist of the group being taught by her father since her childhood.

description: __Height:__ 163 cm __Classification:__ Esper __School:__ Tokiwadai Middle School __Esper Power:__ Aero Hand __Power Level:__ 4 Mitsuko Kongou is a transfer student and heiress to Kongou Airlines. She is a Level 4 esper with an ability called "Aero Hand" which allows her to create a powerful gust of wind to propel any objects she touches like a missile. Mitsuko shows pride in herself despite being a new student in the school but shows ignorance of common routines such as finding directions and ki

name: Nojiko
description: Nojiko is the adoptive older sister of Nami (the two are not biologically related but were raised together by Bellemere). She plays a major part in the Arlong arc as she reveals Nami's past to the Straw Hats and helps rescue Luffy with the help of Genzo after Luffy is thrown into the ocean by Arlong with his feet stuck in a block of cement. name: Rin Asano
description: The sole survivor of an Ittō-ryū massacre at Anotsu's hand and heir to her father's sword school, the "Mutenichi-ryū". She has mediocre swordsmanship skills but an intense desire to avenge the brutal death of her family. To aid in this quest, she hires Manji as a bodyguard. It is worth noting that she kisses a sleeping Manji in the fourteenth volume and has shown on numerous occasions that she develops feelings towards him. They are as of now largely unreciprocated. At the beginning of the serie

name: Shounen
description: This mysterious man first appears coming outside of a red machine. Nothing is known about him, and the only thing he carries with him is a golden, cross shaped object.

name: Souichirou Yagami
description: Souichirou Yagami is Light's father and the leader of the remains of his investigation team under L's command. He is a kind man with a strong sense of justice. He cares greatly for his family and the members of the Japanese Task Force. He is a serious and responsible man that gains the respect of many. He has a strong sense of duty, and even after the police stop funding the Kira investigation he continues trying to solve the case with the Task Force.

name: Unji Zuma
description: Unji Zuma is a student at Renjaku High School who is the leader of a gang of outcasts from other high schools. ~!After acquiring Okarun's kintama from a mysterious person, Unji manages to gain spiritual powers and puts himself up to the task of beating the diorama board game Danmanra.!~

name: America
description: __Height:__ 177 cm (5’10”) A young nation that was once called the “New World,” America is the self-proclaimed leader of the Allies. He has blue eyes and short blonde hair, which was changed to a light brownish-blonde color in the anime adaptation. During his early childhood, he was fought over by France, England, and Finland, a fight which England ended up winning. America was raised by England, and the two had a brotherly relationship, all which went bad after the American Revolution. In moder

name: Artemis
description: Artemis is the companion to the leader of the Guardian Senshi—he trained [Minako Aino](https://anilist.co/character/2826/Minako-Aino) as Sailor V, and remains by her side when she takes on her proper role as Sailor Venus. His memory of the Silver Millennium seems to be more intact than Luna's—in fact, before appearing in the Sailor Moon series he guides her through the Sailor V video game at the arcade.
